html:
Pillars are Structures found in Caves and Ruins. They cannot be interacted with or removed without the use of Console Commands. They can obstruct the player's view and movement, and only serve a decorative role.

Gallery

  • Pillar found in the Caves level.
  • Ancient pillars change color during the Nightmare phase of the Nightmare Cycle.
  • A Slimy Pillar found in the Ruins during the Calm Phase of the Nightmare Cycle.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"archive_pillar" |renew = Can't be destroyed}} '''Pillars''' are [[Structures]] found in [[Caves]] and [[Ruins]]. They cannot be interacted with or removed without the use of [[Console]] Commands. They can obstruct the player's view and movement, and only serve a decorative role. =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Cave Pillar 1.jpg|Pillar found in the Caves level. Ruins Pillar 2.jpg|Ancient pillars change color during the Nightmare phase of the [[Nightmare Cycle]].
